Life at Mechasys

Great products are created by great minds


View Open Positions

Life at Mechasys

Great products are created by great minds

View Open Positions

WHERE IT ALL STARTED

The City of Montréal

Mechasys is based in Montreal, a city where vibrant summers and snowy winters shape our culture. From our world-famous bagels to a thriving arts and cinema scene, Montreal’s unique blend of European and North American influences makes it an unforgettable place. As a perfectly bilingual city, where French and English coexist seamlessly, you’re sure to hear the iconic “Bonjour-Hi!” wherever you go.



GREAT MINDS BUILD AWESOMENESS

Our Team

Solving the right industry challenges requires boldness, not just from the management team, but from every team member. At Mechasys, we are proud to have some of the greatest minds working on the development of the XR Projector. With our diverse team, spanning multiple disciplines, cultures, and genders, we have unlocked new levels of creativity to tackle the most complex problems in the construction industry.



THE BUILDERS OF TOMORROW

The Construction Industry

The construction industry is undergoing a significant transformation. Robotics and advanced layout solutions have become essential to improving field productivity, offering tailored solutions directly to workers. Today, construction sites are increasingly automated, with precision tools and innovative software driving greater efficiency, safety, and quality.

Our Values

Our principles guide what we do and how we do it.


Excellence

We are committed to delivering only the best. Excellence is our core value, reflected in the performance of our products.

Innovation

Our commitment to innovation delivers cutting-edge technology in a simple and accessible way to our users.

Collaboration

We place great importance on teamwork throughout our design process, as well as in the final product itself.

Join a team of innovators and leaders dedicated to making a real impact with tangible products that serve everyday people in industrial sectors.
